d	Z	d

dHlST
)JzoConstants/functions for interpreting results of os.stat() and os.lstat().
Suggested usage: from stat import *
zMReturn the portion of the file's mode that can be set by
    os.chmod().
    i
moder
/usr/lib64/python3.9/stat.py
S_IMODE
zLReturn the portion of the file's mode that describes the
    file type.
    i
S_IFMT
z(Return True if mode is from a directory.)
S_IFDIRr
S_ISDIR2
z<Return True if mode is from a character special device file.)
S_IFCHRr
S_ISCHR6
z8Return True if mode is from a block special device file.)
S_IFBLKr
S_ISBLK:
z+Return True if mode is from a regular file.)
S_IFREGr
S_ISREG>
z0Return True if mode is from a FIFO (named pipe).)
S_IFIFOr
S_ISFIFOB
z,Return True if mode is from a symbolic link.)
S_IFLNKr
S_ISLNKF
z%Return True if mode is from a socket.)
S_IFSOCKr
S_ISSOCKJ
z#Return True if mode is from a door.Fr
S_ISDOORN
z*Return True if mode is from an event port.Fr
S_ISPORTR
z'Return True if mode is from a whiteout.Fr
S_ISWHTV
z;Convert a file's mode to a string of the form '-rwxrwxrwx'.r*
